scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @taas/domain-sdk && npm run build --workspace @taas/embed-sdk && npm run build --workspace @taas/creator-console && npm run build --workspace @taas/hosted-control
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @taas/domain-sdk && npm run typecheck --workspace @taas/embed-sdk && npm run typecheck --workspace @taas/creator-console && npm run typecheck --workspace @taas/hosted-control
scripts.dev:creator-console: npm run build --workspace @taas/domain-sdk && python3 -m http.server 4173 -d apps/creator-console
scripts.dev:hosted-control: npm run build --workspace @taas/domain-sdk && npm run build --workspace @taas/embed-sdk && python3 -m http.server 4174 -d apps/hosted-control
